text:
- Remove DISTNAME
- Use PLIST_DIRSTRY for ETCDIR: configuration file (not in PLIST) is ETCDIR/squid.conf by default
- Use ETCDIR
- Make portlint happier
- Bump PORTREVISION for PLIST change

Port maintainer (tmseck@web.de) is cc'd.
